What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a light blue t-shirt and dark shorts swings a squash racquet inside a court with glass walls. A child in a red t-shirt moves around the court holding another racquet. A black backpack sits on the floor outside the glass wall in the foreground. An electronic device with antennas rests near the backpack. The individuals walk towards the back wall inside the room.

canonical_answer: At 6s, a person in a blue shirt swings a racquetball racquet towards the left; at 8s, a person in a grey shirt lunges while a child in red watches; at 12s, the person in red swings a squash racquet near the back wall; at 16s, the child in red runs towards the right wall while a router appears on the floor; at 18s, both players walk towards opposite walls holding racquets.
